nodes.name: Proxy Pool Management Implementation Plan
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for building a reusable proxy pool with UI management, connectivity checking, proxy-id runtime resolution, and provider/auth-file binding controls. Covers backend Go model, management API, runtime resolution, frontend page, and binding controls across 6 tasks.

nodes.name: Auth File Quota Trends Implementation Plan
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for adding first-tab auth-file trend view for Kimi and Codex credentials, backed by persisted quota snapshots and request logs. Covers Codex quota dimensions, backend SQLite persistence/API, and frontend ECharts-based detail tab.

nodes.name: API Key Permission Profiles Fix Plan
nodes.summary: Plan to refactor API Key permission configuration from batch edit page into reusable permission profiles. Adds YAML-based profiles, refactors ApiKeyPermissionsPage with VirtualTable, and updates API Key forms with profile selection dropdown.

nodes.name: Provider Config Import/Export with Diff Preview Plan
nodes.summary: Plan to add per-tab import/export of provider configurations as JSON with normalized diff preview before import, deduplication, and normalized serialization for the /ai-providers page.
